title: Clam Broil Norval
description: A fresh and chewy Norwegian dish featuring clams, perfect for a breakfast or light meal.
instructions: Rinse clams under cold running water and scrub them gently with a brush.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil if using, then onion and garlic. Sauté until onions are translucent.
Add the clams to the skillet along with some salt and pepper to taste. Cover and let cook for about 5 minutes or until they start to open.
Squeeze in the lemon juice just before serving to brighten the dish.
If you prefer, serve these as a light breakfast topped with fresh herbs like dill or parsley.
